seeds.value: Standard window: checkout 11:00 AM to check-in 3:00 PM (4 hours). Minimum safe window: 3 hours. Back-to-back same-day turnovers flagged as high priority.
Alert fires when cleaning has not started and check-in is within 2 hours. Critical alert when check-in is within 1 hour and turnover incomplete.
seeds.description: When to escalate late or at-risk turnovers
